violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Staff had been using bucket of water for hand washing before arrival.
Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -Water pump went out today, had worked during last operation.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Assisted set-up of temporary hand wash.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Glass door refrigerator had dairy temp of 45F at lower shelves of cooler. *Unit was turned down to lowest setting while on-site. -Recommend moving plastic slides of canned drinks to bottom of fridge to allow better air flow throughout unit.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Burger sauces, chopped lettuce, cut vegetables/toppings and open oat milk were not date marked.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---3 comp sink has splatter/debris residue on surfaces with cloudy sani sink solution at time of inspection.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
